entryPoints.triggerAction: App loads with activeNav initialized to "org" (Org Chart is the default view)
User clicks "Org Chart" in AppShell sidebar to enter or return to the org operating surface
When rootPositions.length === 0, user clicks "Create first position" CTA which focuses the Structure controls position title input
User expands "Structure controls" disclosure and uses the "Create Position" form (title, department, reports-to, Add Position button)

entryPoints.screen: Org Chart — node hover action bar
entryPoints.triggerAction: User hovers an org chart node and clicks "Add related position" to quick-insert a child position via window.prompt

entryPoints.screen: Position panel — Position tab structural actions
entryPoints.triggerAction: With a position selected, user clicks "Add above", "Add below", or "Add parallel" to insert related positions
User clicks an org chart node card (or hover "View details") to open the position panel for that node
User clicks the "Assignment" tab in the position panel tab row to enter assignment management
User expands Structure controls and creates a person (optionally with an initial position assignment) as a prerequisite for assignment dropdown population
After first position is created or first assignment is filled, banner appears; user clicks "Assign person" to return to org view
User clicks the "Documents" tab to enter evidence/document management for the selected position

stateTransitions.to: Org Chart ready (positions loaded or empty)
stateTransitions.trigger: useEffect bootstrap completes: organization context loaded, positions/assignments fetched from API
User submits Structure controls "Add Position" form → handleCreatePosition → createPosition API

stateTransitions.to: New related position inserted in hierarchy
stateTransitions.trigger: User confirms window.prompt title in handleQuickInsertPosition (above/below/parallel) → createPosition (+ optional updatePosition rewire for "above" mode)

stateTransitions.to: New position focused in position panel on Position tab
stateTransitions.trigger: Automatic setFocusPositionId(inserted.id) and setPositionPanelTab("position") inside handleQuickInsertPosition mutation callback

stateTransitions.to: Root or focused position selected in panel
stateTransitions.trigger: Default selection logic: focusPositionId ?? first root position; user click on org node sets focusPositionId

stateTransitions.to: Position panel on Assignment tab with draft fields hydrated
stateTransitions.trigger: User clicks Assignment tab → useEffect populates assignmentDraft* from selectedAssignment runtime
User selects person and clicks "Assign person" / "Create assignment" → handleSaveAssignment → startAssignment when person has no active assignment
handleSaveAssignment detects activePersonAssignment on different position → transferAssignment API
handleSaveAssignment ends current occupant via endAssignment then starts/transfers new person
User clicks "Vacate position" (Position tab) or "End assignment" / "Mark as vacant" (Assignment tab) → handleVacateSelectedPosition → endAssignment

stateTransitions.to: Local assignmentRuntimeByPosition updated with draft status/dates/salary
stateTransitions.trigger: Post-mutation setAssignmentRuntimeByPosition in handleSaveAssignment (client-only runtime overlay)
User clicks Documents tab
User selects file in Documents tab file input → handleUploadPositionDocument creates objectUrl and sets state "draft"
User changes document state select → updatePositionDocumentState (local state only)
After assignment refresh, resolvePositionNodeState finds active assignment → card shows person name and "Active" badge

stateTransitions.to: OrgReadyBanner shown (first position or first fill milestone)
stateTransitions.trigger: useEffect detects justAddedFirstPosition or justFilledFirstPosition → setShowOrgReadyBanner(true)

stateTransitions.to: Mutation complete with refreshed server state
stateTransitions.trigger: runMutation sets mutationStatusText during API call, refreshState reloads data, optional success toast
setFeedbackToast on success/error; 2600ms timeout clears toast

stateTransitions.to: Signature status displays Signed (completion signal for evidence loop)
stateTransitions.trigger: User sets uploaded document state to "signed" via state select; signatureStatus field reads documentStateLabel
refreshState after assignment updates positionAssignmentById.size reflected in AppShell health prop
Structure controls Person Setup with newPersonPositionId set → handleCreatePerson → startAssignment after createPerson

stateTransitions.from: Position with broken reporting line or ended-runtime mismatch
stateTransitions.trigger: hasPositionStructuralIssue returns true → resolvePositionNodeState → card shows Needs attention label

userDecisionNodes.decision: How to define the new position's place in the org
options: Leave as root with no manager
userDecisionNodes.currentUX: Three stacked controls (title input, department select, reports-to select) inside collapsed "Structure controls" details element with no inline guidance on hierarchy impact

userDecisionNodes.screen: Org chart node hover / Position tab
userDecisionNodes.decision: Where to insert a related position in the hierarchy
userDecisionNodes.currentUX: Position tab exposes three explicit buttons; hover bar exposes only "Add related position" (below mode). All use browser window.prompt for title with no visual preview of resulting tree shape

userDecisionNodes.decision: Which aspect of the position to manage
userDecisionNodes.currentUX: Three equal-weight buttons in a 3-column grid; active tab indicated only by #E2E8F0 background vs white, no icons or descriptions of tab purpose

userDecisionNodes.decision: Which person to assign to this position
options: Create new person first via Structure controls
userDecisionNodes.currentUX: Single select dropdown labeled "Person" with "Select person" placeholder; no inline create-person shortcut; helper text only when selected person has no active assignment

userDecisionNodes.decision: What assignment type and dates apply
userDecisionNodes.currentUX: Assignment type select plus start/end date inputs and a separate non-functional "Change assignment type" button; no explanation that type/dates are not persisted to API

userDecisionNodes.screen: Position panel — Assignment tab action row
userDecisionNodes.decision: How to finalize or end the assignment
userDecisionNodes.currentUX: Four adjacent buttons where End assignment and Mark as vacant invoke the same handler; button labels change based on selectedAssignment but semantics overlap

options: Download and fill Job Description template
userDecisionNodes.currentUX: Static read-only labels for Role description/Key responsibilities/KPIs; only file upload and template download are interactive; responsibilities/KPIs cannot be edited in-app

userDecisionNodes.decision: What document lifecycle state to mark
userDecisionNodes.currentUX: Select dropdown on uploaded document card; signature status field above reflects selection. No workflow gates — user can jump directly to Signed

userDecisionNodes.decision: Whether/how to fix reporting line issues
userDecisionNodes.currentUX: Warning banners for missing reporting line and structural issues; "Update reporting line" opens window.prompt listing raw position ID prefixes — not human-readable manager names in the prompt itself

userDecisionNodes.decision: Whether to proceed to assignment after first position creation
userDecisionNodes.currentUX: Fixed bottom banner with "Assign person" button that navigates to org view but does not auto-open Assignment tab or pre-select the new position's assignment flow

frictionPoints.issue: Assignment type, start date, end date, and actual salary are captured in UI but never sent to the API in handleSaveAssignment — only person-to-position linking (start/transfer/end) is persisted
frictionPoints.impact: User believes they configured scheduled/ended assignments and date ranges, but only person assignment is saved; completion signals based on assignment type are unreliable

frictionPoints.issue: "Change assignment type" button is a stub that only calls setError("Assignment type updated.") with no state or API mutation
frictionPoints.impact: User clicks a primary-sounding action expecting assignment type to change; receives an error banner instead of a meaningful state transition

frictionPoints.issue: setAssignmentRuntimeByPosition runs unconditionally after runMutation in handleSaveAssignment/handleVacateSelectedPosition, even when runMutation returns early (e.g., local demo mode) or fails
frictionPoints.impact: UI runtime overlay can desync from server assignment state, showing ended/scheduled status locally while API state differs

frictionPoints.issue: Uploaded documents and their lifecycle states live only in component state (positionDocuments); no API persistence, lost on refresh
frictionPoints.impact: Evidence/completion signal (Signed document) is ephemeral; user cannot treat document upload as durable compliance evidence

frictionPoints.issue: "End assignment" and "Mark as vacant" are duplicate buttons both calling handleVacateSelectedPosition with identical disabled logic
frictionPoints.impact: User cannot distinguish two ostensibly different outcomes; increases cognitive load without providing distinct behavior

frictionPoints.issue: Position creation via handleQuickInsertPosition uses window.prompt for title input instead of in-app form with validation preview
frictionPoints.impact: Jarring modal breaks flow continuity; no visibility into department/reports-to inheritance before creation (only inherited silently from target)

frictionPoints.issue: Update reporting line uses window.prompt with raw position ID prefixes rather than a searchable manager picker
frictionPoints.impact: User must know or copy UUID prefixes to set reporting lines; high error rate for non-technical operators

frictionPoints.issue: handleCreatePosition does not setFocusPositionId on the newly created position (unlike handleQuickInsertPosition)
frictionPoints.impact: After form-based creation user may not see the new position selected in the panel; must manually find and click the node in the chart

frictionPoints.issue: Three tabs (Position, Assignment, Documents) have identical visual weight with minimal active-state differentiation (background color only) and no tab descriptions
frictionPoints.impact: New users cannot infer the intended operating sequence (structure → assign → document) from the tab chrome alone

frictionPoints.issue: Primary position/person creation flows are hidden inside a collapsed <details> "Structure controls" element below the chart
frictionPoints.impact: First-time users landing on populated or empty chart may not discover creation forms without scrolling and expanding; EmptyOrgGuide only focuses an input, does not expand details

frictionPoints.issue: Notes textarea ("Add context") has no onChange handler, state binding, or save action
frictionPoints.impact: User enters contextual notes believing they are saved; data is silently discarded on any navigation

frictionPoints.issue: Role description, Key responsibilities, and KPIs render as static bold labels with no input fields; only file upload populates evidence
frictionPoints.impact: User sees form-like field names but cannot enter structured role content in-app; unclear whether upload is required to satisfy those fields

frictionPoints.issue: Vacant positions display status label "Open" which conflates position vacancy with action workflow "Open" state
frictionPoints.impact: Operator may interpret vacant positions as having open actions rather than being unfilled roles

frictionPoints.issue: onAssignPerson callback only sets activeNav to org and dismisses banner — does not switch positionPanelTab to "assignment" or guide user to Assignment tab
frictionPoints.impact: Post-creation nudge fails to carry user into the next loop step; assignment discovery still depends on finding the tab manually

frictionPoints.issue: positionActionStats and positionComplianceAlerts are computed but never rendered anywhere in the org UI
frictionPoints.impact: Compliance gaps and action load per position are invisible during the core operating loop despite being calculated

frictionPoints.issue: focusedSubtreeRootId state is never set to a non-null value; only reset-to-null button exists
frictionPoints.impact: Subtree focus feature appears partially implemented; "Reset view" button never shows under normal use

deadEnds.description: "Change assignment type" button leads to error message only with no forward path or state change
Notes textarea accepts input but has no save mechanism — user input is a dead end
When people array is empty, person select only shows "Select person" — user must discover collapsed Structure controls Person Setup with no direct link
Role description / Key responsibilities / KPIs labels are display-only — user cannot complete structured evidence in-app without uploading a file
If activated, runMutation blocks all writes with readonly error — core loop cannot complete
Uploaded documents exist only in memory; page refresh returns to empty state with signature status showing Draft despite prior Signed completion

repeatedLogicPaths.description: handleVacateSelectedPosition invoked from three separate buttons with two different labels (Vacate position, End assignment, Mark as vacant) performing identical endAssignment mutation
handleSaveAssignment wired to both primary assign button and conditional secondary "Create assignment" button for unassigned persons

Position creation implemented twice: form-based handleCreatePosition (Structure controls) and prompt-based handleQuickInsertPosition (org chart hover + Position tab buttons) with different post-create focus behavior
downloadJobDescriptionTemplate available from both Documents tab and Templates nav section
Assignment draft hydration useEffect and Assignment tab empty/conditional helper blocks repeat the same unassigned-position messaging patterns
Person-to-position assignment can be initiated from three paths: Assignment tab handleSaveAssignment, Person Setup handleCreatePerson with newPersonPositionId, and transfer via reassignment logic

unclearIntentZones.screen: Position panel — Assignment tab action row
unclearIntentZones.description: End assignment vs Mark as vacant vs Vacate position (on Position tab) use overlapping language but identical or near-identical handlers — unclear which to use when offboarding vs temporary vacancy
Assignment type dropdown coexists with a separate "Change assignment type" button — unclear whether type is edited via select + save or via the button; button does not interact with dropdown
Signature status displays "Draft" when no document is uploaded, implying a document exists in draft rather than being absent

unclearIntentZones.screen: Org Chart — node card status badge
unclearIntentZones.description: Vacant positions labeled "Open" while filled positions labeled "Active" — "Open" reads as action/workflow status not role vacancy
Conditional "Create assignment" block appears only when selected person has no activeAssignmentByPersonId — unclear relationship to main "Assign person" button which performs the same save action
Collapsed details element separates "Department + Position Setup" from "Person Setup" without indicating these are sequential prerequisites for the assignment step in the core loop

unclearIntentZones.screen: Org Chart — node card person line
unclearIntentZones.description: When structural issue detected, person line shows "Needs attention" instead of assigned person name — obscures who occupies the role while flagging structure problems
Document state select allows direct jump to Signed with no review workflow enforcement — unclear whether Signed is an operator assertion or a validated completion gate

happyPath: Expand Structure controls and complete Create Position form (title, department, reports-to)
Click Add Position and wait for success toast
Click the new position node in the org chart to open the position panel
Select a person from the dropdown (create person first via Person Setup if needed)
Click Assign person and confirm success toast; org node updates to Active with person name
Set document state to Signed via the state select
Observe completion signals: org node Active badge, header filled count increment, signature status Signed
primaryLoopSummary.recommendedInterventionSurface: Position panel — Assignment tab (lines 2499-2593): unify assign/save/end actions, remove stub 'Change assignment type' button, fix OrgReadyBanner CTA to open Assignment tab directly on the selected position
